title: Spryzeen's Colorful Lava
body:
![Texture pack cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bAqvq4xC/images/173c369c1ceecfd5b16dce9125fb61c774c362f3.png)
#### Have you ever thought that lava should match nether biomes? I wondered that and started looking for some texture packs that add this feature, however I didn't like the color tones at all, so create this pack that adds more colors for lava, One for each nether nether biome! also i added support for some others biomes


# Features:
- Biome dependency lava color (supports all nether biomes)
- Especial support for Deep dark and all END biomes
- Lava fog color changes too (underlava fog)


# Requirements:
- Optifine, download it here --> https://optifine.net/downloads

#### *Make sure to download the correct version for your minecraft version otherwise it will not work*

# Known Issues:
- OptiFabric don't works 
- Some shaders don't support custom colormaps, with those this pack don't will work fine
